title: Replace text with unique animated yellow/red button in HeroSection

requirements.text: In HeroSection.tsx, locate the second anchor/button element inside the CTA buttons container (matching XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[7]/div[2]/a[2]). Remove its existing text content and replace it with a visually unique animated button styled in yellow and red shades. The button should feature: a gradient background blending yellow (#FFD700 / amber) and red (#EF4444 / rose) tones, a pulsing or glowing animation (e.g., pulse glow, shimmer sweep, or fire-flicker effect using Tailwind keyframes or inline CSS animations), a unique shape or border treatment (e.g., angled clip-path, flame-style border, or animated border-dash), and bold uppercase label text (e.g., 'JOIN NOW' or 'ENLIST'). The button must stand out from existing CTA buttons on the page.

quotes: Is text ko remove kar ke aik button bnao yellow or red shade me ho or animation Bhi ho or unique sa Bhi ho

acceptanceCriteria: The original text content of the second CTA anchor at the specified XPath is removed.
A new button/anchor element is rendered in its place with a yellow-to-red gradient background.
The button has a continuous CSS animation (glow, pulse, shimmer, or flicker effect).
The button has a visually distinct style (border, shape, or effect) that differentiates it from other buttons on the page.
The button displays a short uppercase English label (e.g., 'JOIN NOW' or 'ENLIST').
The button remains fully clickable and preserves its original href/link target.

constraints: Only modify the second anchor element inside the hero CTA container matching the specified XPath — do not alter other buttons or sections.
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Redesigning other sections of the hero or landing page.
Changing the button's navigation target or link.
